testcase.name: Successful login with valid entries
testcase.system-out: Given user navigates to the madison website "http://demo-store.seleniumacademy.com/customer/account/login/".passed When userlogins using username as "lruizabcde@gmail.com"....................passed And user enters password as "lima1234"......................................passed Then login must be successful...............................................passed

testcase.name: Successful login with valid entries 2

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Message: not found expected [My Account] but found [Customer Login] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:140) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:122) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:629) at com.ecommerce.steps.account.Login.login_must_be_successful(Login.java:50) at ✽.Then login must be successful(account/login.feature:9)

testcase.failure:
Given user navigates to the madison website "http://demo-store.seleniumacademy.com/customer/account/login/".passed When userlogins using username as "lruizabcde@gmail.com"....................passed And user enters password as "lima12342".....................................passed Then login must be successful...............................................failed
StackTrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Message: not found expected [My Account] but found [Customer Login] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:140) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:122) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:629) at com.ecommerce.steps.account.Login.login_must_be_successful(Login.java:50) at ✽.Then login must be successful(account/login.feature:9)

testcase.classname: Create New Account on Madison Store
testcase.name: User successfully create new Account on Maddison Store

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: testcase.failure:
Given User is on the Store Registration page................................passed When User enters all required registration fields...........................passed And User clicks in register button..........................................passed Then a store account is created.............................................failed

testcase.name: Password validation
testcase.system-out: Given I try to create an account with password "abc"........................passed Then I should see that the password is "invalid"............................passed

testcase.name: Password validation 2
testcase.system-out: Given I try to create an account with password "ab1"........................passed Then I should see that the password is "invalid"............................passed

testcase.name: Password validation 3
testcase.system-out: Given I try to create an account with password "abc1".......................passed Then I should see that the password is "valid"..............................passed

testcase.name: Password validation 4
testcase.system-out: Given I try to create an account with password "abcd".......................passed Then I should see that the password is "invalid"............................passed

testcase.name: Password validation 5
testcase.system-out: Given I try to create an account with password "abcd1"......................passed Then I should see that the password is "valid"..............................passed

testcase.name: Cart - Adding a product to basket
testcase.system-out: Given I am on a product detail page "http://demo-store.seleniumacademy.com/chelsea-tee-703.html".passed When I select the size/colour/quantity......................................passed And I click the add to basket button........................................passed Then the product is added to my shopping basket.............................passed

testcase.name: Cart - Opening the shopping basket

testcase.failure:
Given I have added an item to my shopping bag...............................passed When I am on a home page "http://demo-store.seleniumacademy.com/"...........passed When I click the shopping cart icon.........................................failed Then I land on the shopping cart page.......................................skipped And I can see the product in my shopping cart...............................skipped
